🌆 Market News Digest
16 Jul 2026, 06:00-16:30 EST

🔥 Top Stories
• U.S. strikes Iran again; shipping risk rises — CENTCOM said fresh airstrikes hit Iran for a 5th straight day as Hormuz traffic fell, keeping energy and geopolitics front and center.
• Fed hawks push back on cuts — Logan and Schmid both argued rates may need to stay modestly higher as inflation risks remain sticky.
• Stocks slide on AI/chip valuation fears — Nasdaq fell 1.5% as chipmakers sold off; Google delayed Gemini 3.5 Pro, adding to AI-spending doubts.

⛽ Oil & Energy
• Middle East supply risk dominates — Iran/Houthi threats to Bab el-Mandeb, Hormuz blockade concerns, and new strikes kept crude volatile; Brent settled at $84.23 and WTI at $78.95.
• Gas and diesel remain tight — U.S. diesel hit $5/gallon; natgas storage rose 41 Bcf, roughly in line with estimates.
• Europe energy warning — ENI said Europe could face high gas prices into Jan. 2027 due to low storage and the Russian gas stop.

📊 Markets & Macro
• U.S. data mixed but consumer resilient — retail sales met estimates at +0.2%, claims stayed low at 208k, while core retail sales fell -0.2%.
• Housing softens — pending home sales dropped -5.4% m/m and mortgage rates hit 6.55%, the highest since Aug. 2025.
• Equity tone weaker — S&P and Dow slipped; Nasdaq led losses as market breadth deteriorated into the close.

🌍 Geopolitical
• Gulf tensions broaden — Kuwait said Iran-linked drone attacks caused damage; Bahrain imposed temporary vessel restrictions; Iraq/Jordan alerts rose after regional strikes.
• Ukraine reshuffles government — parliament approved a new cabinet, including finance and agriculture leadership changes.
• China-U.S. dialogue may resume — Ma Zhaoxu is expected to visit the U.S. next week in a temperature-test for ties.

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Visa enters stablecoins — launched a platform for minting/moving/managing stablecoins for 200M+ merchants.
• Crypto institutional adoption grows — Citadel invested $400M in Crypto.com; T. Rowe Price launched an actively managed multi-token crypto ETF.
• Tokenized finance keeps expanding — MoonPay bought Glide; Alpaca raised $135M for tokenized stock infrastructure; Hyperliquid onchain stock trading surged.

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• ECB survey leans hold — all 74 economists expect the July 23 deposit rate to stay at 2.25%.
• U.S. trade and chip policy heats up — lawmakers urged Lutnick to keep the China memory-chip ban; Brazil pushed back hard on U.S. tariff threats.
• Crypto bill still uncertain — Trump plans talks with senators, but the Crypto Clarity Act is not expected to become law this year.

🏢 Corporate
• Abbott beat and raised — Q2 topped estimates and full-year guidance improved; stock jumped as much as 14%.
• Big banks and asset managers post solid results — State Street beat on EPS/revenue and U.S. Bancorp beat revenue with strong capital ratios.
• Mixed megacap and industrial news — Netflix guided Q3 below estimates, TSM said it will add $100B to Arizona, and Google/Intel struck more AI-cloud ties.
